## Summary
A short description of the issue.

## Severity
- [ ] P0
- [ ] P1
- [ ] P2

## What I was trying to do
Describe the task in plain language.

## What happened
Describe what actually happened.

## What I expected instead
Describe the expected result.

## Reproducibility
- [ ] Always
- [ ] Sometimes
- [ ] Only once so far

## Device details
- iPhone model:
- iOS version:
- App build/version:

## Screen or flow
Examples: Add Item, Holdings, Item Detail, Rates, Settings, Privacy Mode, Biometric lock

## Attachments
Attach screenshots or a screen recording if helpful.

## Additional notes
Anything else that might help reproduce or understand the issue.
